prompts.title: Public Surface Cleanup + Impact Events + API/RSS/Embed Foundation
prompts.area: Public Surface / Impact / API / RSS / Embed

hud.current_slice: Public Surface Cleanup + Impact Events + API/RSS/Embed Foundation

prompts.summary: Cleaned public surface telemetry from raw model names, added deterministic Impact Event generation based on keywords, exposed static JSON API v1 files, valid RSS XML feeds, and visual embed HTML pages. Reconfigured mobile navigation layout to fixed bottom bar showing max 4 buttons with More dropdown popover.
assumptions: Running locally fallback generates basic feeds gracefully
Watchlist contains core default OSINT targeting domains
prompts.next_move: Proceed to CS-010: MVP Freeze + Recovery Docs

prompts.title: Mobile PWA Navigation + Header Repair
prompts.summary: Repaired mobile public shell by moving navigation out of the header, enforcing a fixed four-button bottom nav, adding More menu access to Archive/Watchlist/Status, and replacing prominent raw model diagnostics with compact public-safe status text.
assumptions: CS-009A is an out-of-band repair and does not advance the main prompt chain.
No provider, API, RSS, embed, synthesis, archive, workflow, package, or generated-data behavior was changed.
prompts.next_move: Proceed to CS-010 only after verification.
